actions.name: CLR Host
actions.description: Provide headers and libs for hosting the .NET CLR from native C++ (mscoree + metahost). Headers: mscoree.h, metahost.h. Libs: mscoree.lib, corguids.lib.

actions.name: CLR Debug
actions.description: Provide headers and libs for attaching a native debugger to managed .NET code (cordebug). Header: cordebug.h. Lib: corguids.lib.

actions.name: CLR Profiler
actions.description: Provide headers and libs for building a .NET CLR profiler (corprof). Header: corprof.h. Lib: corguids.lib. Use for APM, code coverage, method tracing.
